title: UPDATE: Change to Patient Note Program for the Step 2 CS Exam
citation: ECFMG. UPDATE: Change to Patient Note Program for the Step 2 CS Exam. Jun 19, 2017. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Historical patient-note timing and auto-submit behavior for station runtime design.
claims_supported: ECFMG announced automatic submission of Step 2 CS patient notes at the end of the allotted 25-minute patient encounter period.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR should reuse any confidential patient-note interface or exam content.
That OpenClinXR patient-note scoring is validated for high-stakes use.
